title: Illumina TruSeq Library quantification with qPCR probe method
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"k207","text":"A homemade solution for quantification of Illumina library.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ct6ee","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"93uqr","text":"Because the method uses a quenched-probe (not intercalator), it is expected to be relatively stable for the difference of size distribution of libraries.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3siu3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"52ga3","text":"Currently, we confirmed this protocol with a probe for TruSeq type adapter.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

(IDT)","link":"https://www.idtdna.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Prepare low-TE buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl, 0.1 mM EDTA, pH 8.0) containing 5 ng/μl salmon sperm DNA. %s %s Store in -20 °C.

Prepare 20x primers & probe mix solution as below. %s %s Store in -20 °C. Double-quenched probe ( IDT ): /56-FAM/ACACTCTTT/ZEN/CCCTACACGACGCTCTTC/3IABkFQ/ P5 primer: 5'-AATGATACGGCGACCACCGA-3' P7 primer: 5'-CAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGA-3’

Prepare the following qPCR master mix per reactions for the number of your samples (+ calibrators). %s %s Distribute above to each well. Add 1 μl of template (diluted library or calibrator) to each well.
An example of expected result Calculate the original concentration of your library.
Conduct PCR with the following condition. 95 °C for 2 min 30 cycles of 97 °C for 5s 62 °C for 10s 68 °C for 15s (photo with a filter appropriate for SYBR-green or FAM)
Prepare dilution series of PhiX control with low-TE buffer containing 5 ng/μl salmon sperm DNA in 8-strip PCR tubes. These are used as calibrators. %s %s Store in -20 °C.
creator: Kentaro Itokawa
